zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Baguley於1578年出生在英國素福爾可萊塔姆時，他的父親Robert Baguley42歲，母親Jane Smith28歲。他於1597年與Jane Wrentham Cummings在英國英格蘭素福爾可萊塔姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1626年5月17日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素福爾可萊塔姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Baguley于1578年出生在英国素福爾可萊塔姆时，他的父亲Robert Baguley42岁，母亲Jane Smith28岁。他于1597年与Jane Wrentham Cummings在英国英格兰素福爾可萊塔姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1626年5月17日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素福爾可萊塔姆。

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Baguley was born in 1578, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Baguley, was 42 and his mother, Jane Smith, was 28. He married Jane Wrentham Cummings in 1597, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died before 17 May 1626, in his hometown, and was buried in Wrentham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Baguley est né en 1578, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Baguley, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Jane Smith, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Jane Wrentham Cummings en 1597, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant 17 mai 1626, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Baguley(이)가 1578년 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Baguley(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Smith(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1597년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 렌섬에서 Jane Wrentham Cummings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1626년 5월 17일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 렌섬에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Baguley родился в 1578 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Baguley было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Smith, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Wrentham Cummings в 1597 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед 17 май 1626 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия.
